title: psychotria oreotrephes
intro: Psychotria oreotrephes is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiales or coffee of the forest due to its coffee-like flavor. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Psychotria oreotrephes can be found as a tea, infusion, or decoction, which is often used to support overall health and well-being.
